title: Peripheral Blood Sample Processing, RNA Extraction, and qRT-PCR for GRα and GRβ Quantification in NSCLC Patients
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"j3vgy","text":"This protocol outlines the step-by-step methodology for peripheral blood collection, buffy coat isolation, RNA extraction, cDNA synthesis, and quantitative real-time PCR (qRT-PCR) to measure GRα and GRβ expression in non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) patients undergoing pemetrexed treatment. It includes detailed instructions for sample processing using Ficoll density gradient centrifugation, RNA quality control, cDNA synthesis conditions, and qRT-PCR execution using SYBR Green chemistry. This standardized procedure enables reproducible quantification of gene expression levels from clinical blood specimens.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"xa7up","text":"This protocol provides standardized procedures for peripheral blood collection, RNA extraction, and qRT-PCR analysis. Users should ensure compliance with institutional biosafety and ethical requirements before performing the protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"b601c","text":"Before starting this protocol, ensure that:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"68dk9","text":"1. Institutional Review Board (IRB) approval for working with human peripheral blood samples has been obtained.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dtiim","text":"2. All required materials, reagents, and equipment for blood processing, RNA extraction, and qRT-PCR are prepared and calibrated.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"lv79","text":"3. RNase-free work conditions are established, including cleaned benches, sterilized tools, and use of RNase-free consumables.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2cvt1","text":"4. Personal protective equipment (PPE) such as lab coat, gloves, and face protection is available and used throughout.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3f1dt","text":"5. Sample labeling, documentation templates, and storage conditions (4°C for short-term, –80°C for long-term) are prepared and verified.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"3mj64","text":"Handle human blood samples under biosafety level-2 (BSL-2) conditions and follow appropriate PPE and waste disposal procedures.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Collect 5 mL of peripheral blood in sterile EDTA-K2 tubes during routine follow-up visits.
Keep samples at 4°C and process within 2 hours to ensure RNA integrity.

Perform leukocyte separation using Ficoll density gradient centrifugation: Layer blood diluted with PBS (1:1) over Ficoll in 15 mL conical tubes and centrifuge at 400 × g for 20 minutes at room temperature with brake off.
Collect the buffy coat layer using a sterile pipette and transfer to RNase-free tubes. Store immediately at −80°C until RNA extraction.
Extract total RNA using RNeasy Midi Kit (Qiagen, Cat# 74104) according to the manufacturer’s instructions. Elute RNA in 100 μL RNase-free water.
Assess RNA quantity and purity using NanoDrop ND-1000 spectrophotometer by recording A260, A260/A280, and A260/A230 ratios.
Evaluate RNA integrity by 1% agarose gel electrophoresis in 1× TAE buffer stained with SYBR Green II RNA stain. Confirm presence of 28S and 18S bands.
Synthesize cDNA from 1 μg of total RNA using RevertAid First Strand cDNA Synthesis Kit (Thermo Fisher, Cat# K1622) following the thermal profile: 65°C for 5 min, 42°C for 60 min, 70°C for 5 min.
Perform qRT-PCR using LightCycler 96 system (Roche) and Maxima SYBR Green/ROX qPCR Master Mix (Thermo Fisher, Cat# K0221).
Include technical duplicates for each sample and non-template control (NTC).
Use beta-actin (ACTB) as the housekeeping gene.
Calculate relative expression using 2 −ΔCT me thod. Report normalized GRα and GRβ expression levels.
creator: Bahareh Forouzani-Haghighi
